name: STT Evaluation
short_description: Benchmarking ASR systems on entity accuracy, WER, and intent preservation using the gold-92 held-out set.
detailed_description: Covers tasks that measure how well a speech-to-text system transcribes Rezolve production audio. Primary metrics are entity accuracy on action-critical spans, word error rate, and intent preservation, evaluated against the gold-92 benchmark. This category includes initial baseline runs, cross-system comparisons, and regression checks. It does not include tasks that modify the STT pipeline itself — see entity-correction, confidence-routing, and whisper-finetuning for those.
